languages.text: Whenever the Navy Officer uses the {g|f:f0d6fd0433624181a3a6c9bb6fd60ab5}Brace for Impact!{/g} ability, all enemies in a 5-cell radius around them suffer −{uip|Debuff|8379931fea56440192a660288fada89a} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and −{uip|Debuff|8379931fea56440192a660288fada89a} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.
